scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @workspace/xd-journal typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/admin typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/content typecheck
